recommendations.title: Against the Ice
recommendations.overview: In 1909, two explorers fight to survive after they're left behind while on a Danish expedition in ice-covered Greenland.

recommendations.title: Cast Away

recommendations.title: For the Birds

recommendations.title: The Red Turtle
recommendations.overview: The dialogue-less film follows the major life stages of a castaway on a deserted tropical island populated by turtles, crabs and birds.

recommendations.title: LEGO Batman: The Movie - DC Super Heroes Unite
recommendations.overview: Joker teams up with Lex Luthor to destroy the world one brick at a time. It's up to Batman, Superman and the rest of the Justice League to stop them.

recommendations.title: Planet 51
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: When Earth astronaut Capt. Chuck Baker arrives on Planet 51 -- a world reminiscent of American suburbia circa 1950 -- he tries to avoid capture, recover his spaceship and make it home safely, all with the help of an empathetic little green being.

recommendations.title: Free Birds
recommendations.overview: Two turkeys from opposite sides of the tracks must put aside their differences and team up to travel back in time to change the course of history—and get turkey off the holiday menu for good.
